data.body:
## Revision: Adversarial finding superseded

The adversarial review finding about implementation-plan needing graceful degradation is superseded. Implementation-plan gets a hard exit guard like all other skills. Sprint will be updated (in a separate story) to invoke implementation-plan via Skill tool instead of Task tool, so the guard will never trigger in the normal sprint flow. The guard protects against any other orchestrator attempting to dispatch implementation-plan as a sub-agent.
